entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cross-pollinating diploid crop with significant genetic variability.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The wealth of variability accumulated in pearl millet through natural and human selection.

entities.name: NATURAL SELECTION
entities.description: A process that contributed to the accumulation of variability in pearl millet.

entities.name: CROSS POLLINATION
entities.description: The method of pollination in pearl millet.

entities.name: DIPLOIDY
entities.description: The chromosomal state of pearl millet.

entities.name: POLYPHYLETIC ORIGIN
entities.description: The evolutionary origin of pearl millet contributing to its genetic load and variation.

entities.name: GENETIC LOAD
entities.description: The genetic burden associated with the polyphyletic origin of pearl millet.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The movement of genes between weedy/wild relatives and cultivated pearl millet.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Weedy and wild species related to pearl millet that contribute to its genetic variation.

entities.name: CULTIVATED TYPES
entities.description: The domesticated versions of pearl millet.

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of environments that have enhanced the natural variation of pearl millet.

entities.name: HUMAN SELECTION
entities.description: The process of artificial selection that augmented the diversity of pearl millet.

entities.name: GENETIC STOCKS
entities.description: Collections of pearl millet genetic material assembled at ICRISAT.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The institution where large numbers of pearl millet genetic stocks are assembled.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic resources of pearl millet that have been evaluated and utilized.
